name: Kuobrothers Corp.
summary: Kuobrothers Corp. operates B2C e-commerce business under the Living Bazaar name In Taiwan. The company provides online shopping platform for daily consumables, electric apparatuses, household commodities, storage and decoration devices, and delicacies. It also operates online trading platforms under the MobiX and MySport brand names. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
